---
title: "Analysis"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(lme4)

model_prop <- lmer(
  mean_prop_growth ~ Treatment + Year + (1|Block),
  data = mean_prop_growth_1
)

summary(model_prop)
anova(model_prop)
```

```{r}
model_raw <- lmer(
  mean_indiv_growth_cm2 ~ Treatment * Year + (1|Block),
  data = mean_indiv_growth_agg
)

summary(model_raw)
anova(model_raw)
```




```{r}
model_density <- lmer(n_corals ~ Treatment + Year + (1|Block), data = mean_indiv_growth_agg)

summary(model_density)
anova(model_density)
```

```{r}
#model checking 
#
plot(model_density)


res <- resid(model_density)

qqnorm(res)
qqline(res, col = "red")

hist(mean_indiv_growth_agg$n_corals)
```


```{r}
library(performance)

r2(model_density)
```


```{r}
library(lme4)
library(performance)

# Full model
model_full <- lmer(n_corals ~ Treatment + Year + (1|Block),
                   data = mean_indiv_growth_agg)

# Density-only model (Year only)
model_density_only <- lmer(n_corals ~ Year + (1|Block),
                           data = mean_indiv_growth_agg)

# Treatment-only model
model_treatment_only <- lmer(n_corals ~ Treatment + (1|Block),
                             data = mean_indiv_growth_agg)
```



```{r}
r2_full <- r2(model_full)
r2_density <- r2(model_density_only)
r2_treatment <- r2(model_treatment_only)
```


```{r}
r2_table <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Density only (Year)",
            "Treatment only",
            "Full model"),
  Marginal_R2 = c(r2_density$R2_marginal,
                  r2_treatment$R2_marginal,
                  r2_full$R2_marginal),
  Conditional_R2 = c(r2_density$R2_conditional,
                     r2_treatment$R2_conditional,
                     r2_full$R2_conditional)
)

r2_table
```
